question: The book _____ cover is red is mine.
explanation: whose表示所有格关系，修饰cover，指“书的封面是红色的”。which和that引导定语从句时在句中作主语或宾语，不作定语；who指人。
subject: english

question: _____ we will hold the meeting has not been decided yet.
explanation: 主语从句不缺成分，但含有“是否”的含义，故用whether引导。that引导主语从句时在句中不作成分；what表示“什么”；which表示“哪一个”。
subject: english

question: _____ the rain stops, we won't be able to go out.
explanation: unless = if...not，意为“除非”，引导条件状语从句，符合句意“除非雨停，否则我们不能出去”。if表条件但不含否定意义；when表时间；since表原因或时间。
subject: english

question: If I _____ the truth at that time, I would have helped you.
explanation: 根据主句的would have helped可知是与过去事实相反的虚拟语气，从句应使用过去完成时had known。
subject: english

question: The doctor recommended that he _____ smoking.
explanation: recommend等表示建议、要求、命令的动词后接宾语从句时，从句用虚拟语气，即should + 动词原形，should可省略。
subject: english

question: I regret _____ you that your application has been rejected.
explanation: regret to do sth. 表示“很遗憾要做某事”，常用于告知不好的消息；regret doing sth. 表示“后悔做过某事”。根据句意“很遗憾地通知你”，应选不定式。
subject: english

question: You _____ have come earlier. The train left ten minutes ago.
explanation: should have done表示“应该做而未做”，含有责备意味。can have done不常见；must have done表示对过去情况的肯定推测；need have done表示“需要做而未做”。
subject: english

question: By the time the police arrived, the thief _____.
explanation: by the time + 过去时间，主句应使用过去完成时，表示在过去的某一时间点之前已经完成的动作。
subject: english

question: Never in my life _____ such a terrible experience.
explanation: never等否定词置于句首时，句子应使用部分倒装结构。谓语的一部分（助动词）移至主语之前，故选have I had。
subject: english

question: It was not until 1920 _____ regular radio broadcasts began.
explanation: 本句是It was not until...that...强调句型，强调的是时间状语not until 1920。去掉It was...that结构后句子结构完整。
subject: english

question: If possible, I'd like to have the meeting _____ tomorrow.
explanation: if possible = if it is possible，省略了it is，保留possible。the meeting与hold之间是被动关系，故用过去分词held作宾语补足语。
subject: english

question: The number of students in our school _____ greatly increased this year.
explanation: the number of作主语时，谓语动词用单数形式。a number of表示“许多”，谓语用复数。注意区分the number of和a number of。
subject: english

question: The teacher was angry _____ the students for their carelessness.
explanation: be angry with sb.表示“对某人生气”；be angry at/about sth.表示“因某事生气”。句中the students是生气对象，故用with。
subject: english

question: His speech was so _____ that everyone was deeply moved.
explanation: touching表示“令人感动的”，是现在分词作形容词用，描述事物的特征；touched表示“被感动的”，是过去分词，表示人的感受。speech是物，故用touching。
subject: english

question: The building _____ last year looks very modern.
explanation: the building与complete之间是被动关系，且动作已发生（last year），故用过去分词completed作后置定语，相当于which was completed last year。
subject: english

question: Weather _____ , we will go camping tomorrow.
explanation: 独立主格结构：名词+现在分词。weather与permit之间是主动关系，且表示正在进行，故用现在分词permitting。Weather permitting = If weather permits。
subject: english

question: I saw him _____ the street when I looked out of the window.
explanation: see sb. doing sth.表示“看见某人正在做某事”。see sb. do sth.表示“看见某人做过某事”。根据句意“当我往窗外看时”，表示正在发生，故用crossing。
subject: english

question: —I'm sorry for being late. —_____.
explanation: 对别人道歉的回应应用That's all right / It doesn't matter / No problem。That's right用于回答正确与否；You're welcome用于回应感谢；Don't mention it也用于回应感谢或道歉。
subject: english

question: The main purpose of the passage is to _____.
explanation: 这是阅读理解中考查主旨大意题的典型表述。题干询问文章的主要目的，即文章的主旨大意。选项A是记叙文特征，B是议论文特征，C是劝说类文章特征，D是说明文特征。
subject: english

question: The word "parameters" in paragraph 3 probably means _____.
explanation: 这是阅读理解中考查词义猜测的典型题型。根据上下文语境，parameters在此处应指“限制因素”或“界限”，与limits含义最接近。rules指规则；standards指标准；factors指因素。
subject: english

question: _____ all the difficulties, they finished the project ahead of schedule.
explanation: despite表示“尽管”，后接名词或动名词；although表示“尽管”，后接从句。they finished the project ahead of schedule是一个完整句子，前面应使用连词。despite后不能直接接句子，需用despite the fact that。
subject: english

question: The professor has a very good knowledge of physics, _____ of which he is not a little proud.
explanation: 这是一个非限制性定语从句，which代替前面的整个句子在从句中作介词of的宾语。that不能引导非限制性定语从句；this、what不能引导定语从句。
subject: english

question: _____ is hard is to do good all one's life and never do anything bad.
explanation: 本题考察it作形式主语的用法。设空处引导主语从句，且在从句中作主语，表示“什么”，应用what引导。It is hard to do...才是it作形式主语的结构，但原句is hard前已有is，故不适用。
subject: english

question: _____ a student, you are supposed to study hard.
explanation: as作为介词，后接名词或动名词。being a student是介词as的宾语，在句中作状语表示原因。to be表示目的；having been表示完成且强调先于谓语；be是动词原形，不能直接接在介词后。
subject: english

question: The experiment was a great success, which proved the _____ of his theory.
explanation: 介词of后接名词。the truth of表示“...的真实性”。true是形容词；truly是副词；trust是动词或名词，不符合句意和语法结构。
subject: english

question: There _____ a pen and some books on the desk.
explanation: there be句型中，谓语动词的单复数取决于其后的第一个名词。a pen是单数，故谓语用is。句中无明显过去时间标志，故用一般现在时。
subject: english

question: The word "ambiguous" is most likely to appear in _____.
explanation: ambiguous表示“含糊不清的、模棱两可的”，属于较为正式的词汇，常出现在词典或学术文章中解释词义的语境中。在小说、物理课本或化学实验报告中出现的可能性较小。
subject: english

question: Which of the following sentence structures is more appropriate for a high-scoring composition?

options.label: A
options.text: I think that this is a good thing.

options.label: B
options.text: In my opinion, this is a good thing.

options.label: C
options.text: This is what I think is a good thing.

options.label: D
options.text: About this thing, I think it is good.

explanation: 高分作文要求表达地道、简洁。In my opinion置前更符合英文表达习惯，比I think that...更正式。A项I think that较口语化；C项句子结构混乱；D项About this thing表达不地道。
subject: english

question: When reading a passage for the main idea, you should _____.

options.label: B
options.text: look for the topic sentence in each paragraph

options.label: D
options.text: memorize all the new words first

explanation: 略读（skimming）用于快速获取文章主旨大意，其策略是寻找每段的主题句或关键词，而非逐字精读。选项A、C、D都是精读策略，不适用于主旨大意题。
subject: english

question: In a letter of advice writing, which of the following is NOT appropriate?

options.label: B
options.text: I suggest you to give up smoking.

options.label: D
options.text: Why not consider taking up a hobby?

explanation: suggest表示“建议”时，后接动名词或that从句（should + 动词原形），不能接不定式。I suggest you to give up是错误结构。正确的表达应为：I suggest your giving up / I suggest that you (should) give up。
subject: english
